description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test, npm_package_test, release, and publish, and set the global variable GIT_SSL_NO_VERIFY to true. In the test stage add a test job using the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 image that runs mvn clean verify exec:java with MAVEN_OPTS set to -Dmaven.repo.local=/cache/maven.repository. In the npm_package_test stage add a npm_package_test job using node:6 that first cd npm-package and runs yarn install --freeze-lockfile --ignore-engines, then executes npm run test:ci. In the publish stage add a publish job using node:6 that also cd npm-package and runs yarn install --freeze-lockfile --ignore-engines, then runs npm run compile and $(yarn bin)/npm-publish-git-tag, only when a Git tag is pushed, and provides the NPM_TOKEN variable. In the release stage add a release job using node:6 that cd npm-package, runs yarn install --freeze-lockfile, then executes $(yarn bin)/semantic-release-gitlab, only for the npm-publish-automated@desdr/doubleagent-validator tag, with DEBUG, GITLAB_AUTH_TOKEN, and NODE_DEBUG variables set.
